applications.description: A list of applications associated with the AppStream image, including their details such as ARN, display name, and launch parameters.

appstream_agent_version.description: The version of the AppStream agent that is installed on the image.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AppStream image.

base_image_arn.description: The ARN of the base image used to create this AppStream image.

created_time.description: The date and time when the AppStream image was created.

description.description: A description of the AppStream image.

display_name.description: The display name of the AppStream image.

image_builder_name.description: The name of the image builder used to create the AppStream image.

image_builder_supported.description: Indicates whether the image is supported for use with an image builder.

image_permissions.description: Permissions associated with the AppStream image, specifying if it's allowed for use in fleets and with image builders.

name.description: The name of the AppStream image.

platform.description: The platform type of the AppStream image, such as Windows or Linux.

public_base_image_released_date.description: The release date of the public base image from which this AppStream image was created.

state.description: The current state of the AppStream image, such as 'AVAILABLE' or 'PENDING'.

state_change_reason.description: The reason for the last state change of the AppStream image, including a code and message.
